name: git-scraper
description: Personal price scraper with GitHub Actions, GitHub Pages dashboard, and issue-driven product ingestion.

scripts.lint: eslint --max-warnings=0 .github/scripts src test test_support scripts eslint.config.js
scripts.test: node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none test/catalog_schema.test.js test/failure_classification.test.js test/heuristics.test.js test/issue_ingest_parser.test.js test/pool.test.js test/price_parse.test.js test/search_adapters.test.js test/search_engine.test.js test/search_ranking.test.js test/scrape_pipeline.test.js test/smoke_real.test.js test/storage_manifest.test.js
scripts.test:unit: node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none test/catalog_schema.test.js test/failure_classification.test.js test/heuristics.test.js test/issue_ingest_parser.test.js test/pool.test.js test/price_parse.test.js test/search_ranking.test.js test/smoke_real.test.js
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run validate:catalog && npm run test:unit && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:integration && npm run test:coverage:critical
